author: lOrm
content: Issue calls for a SystemGateway trait abstracting std::process::Command, std::fs, and config::load_config calls currently embedded in TUI slash-command branches (/diff, /init, /doctor, /review, /files, /export, /load) so the render thread doesn't block on git/shell/filesystem I/O. Not addressable in a cleanup pass: tightly coupled to #253 (App decomposition) and #259 (slash registry) — the gateway is owned by App.Services per #253. Should land as part of the larger TUI architectural refactor wave, not as a point change. Owner-level scope.
